# Topotecan 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Topotecan 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Topotecan</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Topotecan 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Topotecan monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of:- patients with metastatic carcinoma of the ovary after failure of first-line or subsequent therapy- patients with relapsed small cell lung...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>female breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>primary non-gestational choriocarcinoma of ovary（99.9%）</li>
<li>ovarian clear cell adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>yolk sac tumor（99.7%）</li>
<li>ovarian mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>maligant granulosa cell tumor of ovary（99.6%）</li>
<li>adult germ cell tumor（99.6%）</li>
<li>ovarian endometrioid adenocarcinoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>malignant non-dysgerminomatous germ cell tumor of ovary（99.5%）</li>
<li>testicular yolk sac tumor, endodermal sinus pattern（99.5%）</li>
<li>testicular yolk sac tumor, solid pattern（99.5%）</li>
<li>testicular yolk sac tumor, papillary pattern（99.5%）</li>
<li>testicular yolk sac tumor, hepatoid pattern（99.5%）</li>
<li>testicular yolk sac tumor, macrocystic pattern（99.5%）</li>
<li>enteric pattern testicular yolk sac tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>polyvesicular vitelline pattern testicular yolk sac tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>reticular pattern testicular yolk sac tumor（99.5%）</li>
<li>rectum mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>mediastinal malignant germ cell tumor（99.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/topotecan/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
